system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_lenhcapphat_govan_ver2","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_LENHCAPPHAT_GOVAN_VER2]
( 
	@MADDH   nvarchar(200), 
	@MASP    nvarchar(200), 
	@MAHTR   nvarchar(200), 
	@SOLUONG int
)
AS
BEGIN
    --DECLARE @MADDH NVARCHAR(200) = N'DQH-DQHF01/0620';
    --DECLARE @MASP NVARCHAR(200) = N'50118_BB118_BBA';
    --DECLARE @MAHTR NVARCHAR(200) = N'W50118_TL'
    --DECLARE @SOLUONG INT = 168;

    DECLARE @LENHCAPPHAT TABLE
    ( 
	    MADDH          nvarchar(200), 
	    MASP           nvarchar(200), 
	    TENSP          nvarchar(max), 
	    NGUYENLIEU     nvarchar(200), 
	    LOAINGUYENLIEU nvarchar(5), 
	    DAY_TC         decimal(18, 2), 
	    M3_TC          decimal(18, 5), 
	    HESO_HAOHUT    decimal(18, 3), 
	    KL_PHOI        decimal(18, 5), 
	    DAYPHOI        decimal(18, 2), 
	    NHOM           nvarchar(10)
    );

    INSERT INTO @LENHCAPPHAT
    ( 
		 MADDH
	    , MASP
	    , NGUYENLIEU
	    , LOAINGUYENLIEU
	    , DAY_TC
	    , M3_TC
	    , HESO_HAOHUT
	    , KL_PHOI
	    , DAYPHOI
	    , NHOM
    )
    EXEC TR_LENHCAPPHAT_GOVAN_2 @MADDH, 
						  @MASP, 
						  @SOLUONG

    SELECT 
		 A.MADDH
	    , @MAHTR AS MAHTR
	    , A.MASP
	    , B.tensp AS TENSP
	    , @SOLUONG AS SOLUONGDONHANG
	    , A.NGUYENLIEU
	    , A.DAY_TC
	    , A.M3_TC
	    , A.DAYPHOI
	    , COL = CASE
			  WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO' AND A.NGUYENLIEU = N'THÔNG' THEN(A.M3_TC * 1.4)
			  ELSE 0 END
	    , MR = CASE
			 WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO' AND A.NGUYENLIEU = N'THÔNG' THEN(A.M3_TC * 1.5)
			 ELSE 0 END
	    , IND = CASE
			  WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO' AND A.NGUYENLIEU = N'THÔNG' THEN(A.M3_TC * 1.6)
			  ELSE 0 END
	    , TRAM = CASE
			   WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO' AND A.NGUYENLIEU = N'TRÀM' THEN(A.M3_TC * 2.0)
			   ELSE 0 END
	    , CAOSU = CASE
			    WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO' AND A.NGUYENLIEU = N'CAO SU' THEN(A.M3_TC * 1.5)
			    ELSE 0 END
	    , AB18 = CASE
			   WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO'
				   AND ( A.NGUYENLIEU = N'DẺ GAI'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'BEECH'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'POPLAR'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'ASH'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'SỒI' ) THEN(A.M3_TC * 1.8)
			   ELSE 0 END
	    , ABC2 = CASE
			   WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO'
				   AND ( A.NGUYENLIEU = N'DẺ GAI'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'BEECH'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'POPLAR'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'ASH'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'SỒI' ) THEN(A.M3_TC * 2.0)
			   ELSE 0 END
	    , BC22 = CASE
			   WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO'
				   AND ( A.NGUYENLIEU = N'DẺ GAI'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'BEECH'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'POPLAR'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'ASH'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'SỒI' ) THEN(A.M3_TC * 2.2)
			   ELSE 0 END
	    , AB16 = CASE
			   WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO'
				   AND ( A.NGUYENLIEU = N'DẺ GAI'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'BEECH'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'POPLAR'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'ASH'
					    OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'SỒI' ) THEN(A.M3_TC * 1.6)
			   ELSE 0 END
	    , ABC18 = CASE
			    WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO'
				    AND ( A.NGUYENLIEU = N'DẺ GAI'
						OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'BEECH'
						OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'POPLAR'
						OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'ASH'
						OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'SỒI' ) THEN(A.M3_TC * 1.8)
			    ELSE 0 END
	    , BC2 = CASE
			  WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO'
				  AND ( A.NGUYENLIEU = N'DẺ GAI'
					   OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'BEECH'
					   OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'POPLAR'
					   OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'ASH'
					   OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'SỒI ĐỎ'
					   OR A.NGUYENLIEU = N'SỒI' ) THEN(A.M3_TC * 2.0)
			  ELSE 0 END
	    , VAN = CASE
			  WHEN A.NHOM = N'VAN' THEN(A.M3_TC * 1.2)
			  ELSE 0 END
	    , OTHER = CASE
			    WHEN A.NHOM = N'GO'
				    AND ( A.NGUYENLIEU = N'GỖ CỨNG') THEN(A.M3_TC * 1.6)
			    ELSE 0 END
	    , VANSUDUNG = CASE
				   WHEN A.NHOM = 'VAN' THEN CONCAT(FORMAT(A.DAY_TC, 'N0'), '*1220*2440')
				   ELSE '' END
	    , A.NHOM
	    , NULL AS GHICHU
    FROM   @LENHCAPPHAT AS A
		 LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham AS B
		 ON A.MASP = B.masp
    WHERE  ISNULL(A.M3_TC, 0) > 0
    ORDER BY 
		   A.NHOM
		 , A.MASP
		 , A.NGUYENLIEU
		 , A.DAY_TC
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["calls-other-proc"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
